baseline.observed: Before the guard, prompt or context text with risk-pattern content could proceed toward the external GLM improvement path. Earlier slices redacted stdout and local recommendations, but the external routing boundary still needed a fail-closed preflight.

change.summary: Added a risk-pattern guard before GLM configuration is read, returns local fallback with non-secret warning labels, and redacts risky context before local recommendation text is assembled.

verification.result: PASS: 4 focused tests passed, including risky prompt/context external-block coverage and local prompt/context redaction coverage.
PASS: 10 UI helper tests, Vite build, 45 Rust library tests, 15 CLI tests, doc-tests, and strict clippy passed.

decision: Keep. PromptVault now avoids sending risky prompt/context text to the external GLM improve path and keeps local fallback output redacted.
